hero.title: Vehicle Document Tracker
hero.description: Organize vehicle documents, expiry dates, renewal reminders, and document history for personal reference without replacing official government or insurance systems.
points: Track registrations, insurance, inspections, warranties, and custom document types
Review expiry dates, reminder dates, and recently updated records
Keep vehicle records separate, searchable, and easy to refresh

flow.title: Add vehicles ? Track documents ? Review renewals
steps: Create vehicle records with practical registration details
Add document records with issue, expiry, reminder, authority, and status fields
Use filters and insights to review upcoming renewals and expired documents

differences.title: Built for personal document organization
differences.description: Vehicle Document Tracker keeps reminders and references clear while avoiding official-system, legal, or insurance-provider claims.

items.title: Vehicle context
items.description: Group documents by the vehicle they belong to.

items.title: Expiry awareness
items.description: Track issue dates, expiry dates, and renewal reminder dates from saved records.

items.title: Clear boundary
items.description: Use it as a personal tracker, not as legal advice, compliance verification, or an automatic renewal portal.

feel.title: A calm folder for vehicle paperwork
feel.description: The workflow favors quick entry, tidy review, and visible renewal pressure without uploads or external integrations.

items.title: Searchable
items.description: Find documents by vehicle, type, number, authority, notes, or status.

items.title: Reminder-aware
items.description: See expiring, expired, and renewal-due records from stored dates.

items.title: Private by design
items.description: V1 stores metadata only and does not scan, OCR, upload, or validate official files.

audiences.title: Who uses Vehicle Document Tracker
audiences.description: Useful for people who maintain one or more personal vehicles and want clearer renewal visibility.

items.title: Individual drivers
items.description: Track registration, insurance, inspection, and warranty dates.

items.title: Families
items.description: Keep several household vehicles and document types organized.

items.title: Frequent reviewers
items.description: Check upcoming renewals and expired records before they become surprises.

resourceSection.title: Vehicle document essentials
resourceSection.description: The app focuses on metadata users can safely enter and review themselves.

items.title: Vehicle records
items.description: Name, manufacturer, model, year, registration nickname, registration number, and notes.

items.title: Document records
items.description: Type, reference number, issue date, expiry date, reminder date, authority, status, and notes.

items.title: Document types
items.description: Default and custom categories keep documents easy to classify.

groupedSection.title: From record keeping to renewal review
groupedSection.description: Each section supports a direct personal tracking task.

items.name: Vehicles
items.description: Add each car or vehicle once.

items.name: Types
items.description: Use defaults or add custom document types.

items.name: Documents
items.description: Search, filter, sort, edit, archive, restore, and delete records.

items.name: Insights
items.description: Review expiry pressure, upcoming renewals, document distribution, and recent updates.

technicalSection.title: Ansiversa implementation boundary
technicalSection.description: Vehicle Document Tracker is a protected workflow with isolated persistence and no third-party renewal integrations.
items: API-driven protected routes for vehicles, document types, documents, dashboard, and insights.
Isolated mini-app database configured by VEHICLE_DOCUMENT_TRACKER_DATABASE_URL.
No file uploads, OCR, government API integrations, insurance-provider integrations, or legal-compliance verification in V1.

finalCta.title: Open Vehicle Document Tracker
finalCta.description: Start with the documents workspace and review the records that need attention.
